G0.label:
case succ.succ
α : Type u_1
a : α
n✝¹ : Nat
a✝¹ : ∀ (y : Nat), (fun n => replicate n a) n✝¹ = (fun n => replicate n a) y → n✝¹ = y
n✝ : Nat
a✝ : (fun n => replicate n a) (n✝¹ + 1) = (fun n => replicate n a) n✝ → n✝¹ + 1 = n✝
⊢ (fun n => replicate n a) (n✝¹ + 1) = (fun n => replicate n a) (n✝ + 1) → n✝¹ + 1 = n✝ + 1

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
a : α
n : Nat
a_1 : ∀ (y : Nat), (fun n => replicate n a) n = (fun n => replicate n a) y → n = y
n_1 : Nat
a_2 : (fun n => replicate n a) (n + 1) = (fun n => replicate n a) n_1 → n + 1 = n_1
⊢ (fun n => replicate n a) (n + 1) = (fun n => replicate n a) (n_1 + 1) → n + 1 = n_1 + 1
